sourcesContent:
// Mock event data for POC
export const events = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: 'Summer Vogue Runway 2026',
    date: '2026-07-15',
    time: '7:00 PM',
    location: 'Grand Ballroom, The Ritz Hotel, Mumbai',
    category: 'Runway Show',
    price: 2500,
    seats: 200,
    seatsLeft: 48,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'Experience the most glamorous summer runway show featuring top models draped in exclusive designer collections. A night of fashion, art, and elegance.',
    highlights: ['20+ Designer Collections', 'Celebrity Guests', 'After-Party Included', 'Complimentary Champagne'],
    models: [1, 2, 3],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: 'Elite Bridal Showcase 2026',
    date: '2026-08-05',
    time: '5:00 PM',
    location: 'Royal Gardens, Delhi',
    category: 'Bridal Show',
    price: 3500,
    seats: 150,
    seatsLeft: 22,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519741497674-611481863552?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'A breathtaking showcase of the finest bridal couture from the country\'s top designers, modeled by our elite roster of professional models.',
    highlights: ['Exclusive Bridal Collections', 'Top Designers', 'Styling Workshop', 'Gourmet Dinner'],
    models: [2, 4, 5],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: 'Urban Street Style Fest',
    date: '2026-08-20',
    time: '4:00 PM',
    location: 'Bandra Bandstand, Mumbai',
    category: 'Street Show',
    price: 1200,
    seats: 500,
    seatsLeft: 210,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1509631179647-0177331693ae?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'An open-air extravaganza celebrating contemporary street fashion. Discover the boldest looks from emerging designers and rising model talent.',
    highlights: ['Open Air Venue', 'Emerging Designers', 'Live Music', 'Food Stalls'],
    models: [1, 3, 6],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: 'Luxury Brand Gala Night',
    date: '2026-09-10',
    time: '8:00 PM',
    location: 'Taj Palace Convention Centre, Bangalore',
    category: 'Gala',
    price: 5000,
    seats: 100,
    seatsLeft: 10,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540575467063-178a50c2df87?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'An exclusive black-tie gala night showcasing the world\'s most coveted luxury brands. Limited seats available for this elite event.',
    highlights: ['Black Tie Dress Code', 'Luxury Brand Exclusives', 'VIP Networking', 'Fine Dining'],
    models: [2, 5],
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: 'Winter Couture Collection',
    date: '2026-10-18',
    time: '6:30 PM',
    location: 'Hyatt Regency, Kolkata',
    category: 'Runway Show',
    price: 2000,
    seats: 250,
    seatsLeft: 130,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558769132-cb1aea458c5e?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'Welcome the winter season with a spectacular couture runway featuring rich fabrics, intricate embroidery, and timeless elegance.',
    highlights: ['Winter Couture', 'Artisan Craftsmanship', 'Photography Allowed', 'Designer Meet & Greet'],
    models: [1, 4, 6],
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: 'Fusion Ethnic Showcase',
    date: '2026-11-02',
    time: '5:30 PM',
    location: 'ITC Grand, Chennai',
    category: 'Ethnic Show',
    price: 1800,
    seats: 300,
    seatsLeft: 175,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583391733956-3750e0ff4e8b?w=600&q=80',
    description:
      'A vibrant celebration of India\'s rich textile heritage fused with modern silhouettes. Witness tradition reimagined on the runway.',
    highlights: ['Traditional Textiles', 'Regional Designers', 'Cultural Performances', 'Craft Exhibition'],
    models: [3, 4, 5],
  },
];

export const getEventById = (id) => events.find((e) => e.id === parseInt(id));
